mapper.select: SELECT * FROM surgery_entity WHERE record_id = #{recordId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY start_pos ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO surgery_entity (record_id, entity_type, entity_value, entity_unit, confidence, source, start_pos, end_pos, original_text, verified, created_time, updated_time, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.recordId}, #{item.entityType}, #{item.entityValue}, #{item.entityUnit}, #{item.confidence}, #{item.source}, #{item.startPos}, #{item.endPos}, #{item.originalText}, 0, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
